item.title: Most ladder fatalities occur from falls of 10 feet or less, and ladder injuries have increased by 50% over the past decade… probably due to angry wives..😳#funnyvideo #humor #savage
item.description: Most ladder fatalities occur from falls of 10 feet or less, and ladder injuries have increased by 50% over the past decade… probably due to angry wives..😳#funnyvideo #humor #savage
item.author: theblondebrewer

item.title: Happy Mothers Day to this Beautiful Woman.💕I know it hasn’t been easy, but you have been such an amazing mother to Aria and it shows in our daughters smile and contagious happiness with everyone she meets. We love you forever and always.🥰#mom #mother #mot
item.description: Happy Mothers Day to this Beautiful Woman.💕I know it hasn’t been easy, but you have been such an amazing mother to Aria and it shows in our daughters smile and contagious happiness with everyone she meets. We love you forever and always.🥰#mom #mother #mot

item.title: This skit seemed to trigger some..If you’ve watched us for any extended period you’ll know our content is VERY random..we just create content we know we’ll have fun making and hopefully some of you have as much fun watching it. Just remember no one is for
